findings: README states the orchestrator detects agent death via PID check and re-queues tasks; current monitor logic uses tmux pane status (not PID files) and orphan recovery is gated by live_agents==0 and claimed age thresholds.

README describes a monitor pane with real-time progress; implementation does include stuck detection and runtime stats finalization, but key behaviors (tmux census and orphan recovery details) are not documented and can surprise users.
README does not mention "Agent Pulse" explicitly; metaswarm nested progress is described generally but not caveated that it depends on commander-updated swarm-state.json.
